chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.S-1105 of 2023 Date Orders with Signatures of Judges For orders as to non-prosecution 12.05.2025. None present for the petitioner. This petition, presented in office on 18.10.2023, was fixed in Court for hearing on 25.10.2023, when notices were issued to the Respondents with direction to the Respondent No.6 to produce the alleged detenue namely Muradan Khatoon in Court. However, per office note the notices could not be issued as copy of the petition was not supplied by petitioner. Hence on 21.11.2023 and 22.05.2024 the petition was fixed in Court for orders as to non-prosecution and on both dates neither the petitioner nor his counsel turned up. Even today petitioner and his counsel are called absent. Continuous absence of the petitioner and his counsel and their conduct show that they have lost interest in the matter and not pursuing the matter diligently. This petition is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge
